curation_notes: Patch commit is the merge of PR #320 into main. Only src/elf.rs was changed (1 non-test source file). The fix adds a checked_add call for p_vaddr + p_memsz in the validate() function to catch integer overflow from malformed ELF program headers before they cause a panic in relocate(). Pre-assigned class integer-overflow (CWE-190) is correct — the patch directly replaces unchecked addition with checked_add. No sibling files share this pattern; elf.rs is the sole ELF loader.
